//globalEnv: Env vars that participate in the cache key. Change one -> cache invalidates. Keep best-effort telemetry vars here so a telemetry change doesn't serve a stale build.
//globalDependencies: Files that, when changed, invalidate ALL task caches (root tsconfig + .env shape).

build.//: dependsOn ^build = wait for UPSTREAM workspace packages to build first. This is THE build-order contract: @app/contracts (the buildable shared package) must emit its dist before any consumer compiles. Build order is data here, not docs.

test.//: Unit + property tests. Coverage threshold is enforced inside the app's vitest config, not here.

test:int.//: Integration via Testcontainers — non-deterministic (real Docker), so cache:false. Whitelist DOCKER_HOST/TESTCONTAINERS_* into the env so the runner can reach the daemon.

eval.//: Domain acceptance check (deterministic today; redesign for non-determinism when a real LLM is wired behind the port). cache:false so it always runs as a gate.
